name: Lindt Chocolate Breakfast Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1.5 ounces Lindt Swiss milk chocolate with apricot filling
1.5 ounces Lindt Swiss milk chocolate with raspberry filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon sugar and yeast over warm milk in a large bowl; stir to dissolve.
2. Let the mixture stand until foamy and proofed, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir remaining sugar, butter, and salt into the yeast mixture.
4. Gradually stir in flour using a wooden spoon, adding more if necessary to make a smooth, stiff dough.
5. Beat for 5 minutes.
6. Turn the dough out onto a generous floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes.
7. Divide the dough into two halves.
8. Roll each half into a 12-inch circle.
9. Starting from the center, cut each circle into 12 wedges.
10. Divide chocolate bars into sections.
11. Set one section at the base of each wedge.
12. Roll up from the base to the point to form a cylinder.
13. Arrange in rows on a baking sheet, spacing about 2 inches apart.
14. Form each into a crescent.
15. Let rise in a warm, draft-free area until puffed, about 1 hour.
16. Preheat oven to 425°F.
17. Brush tops of rolls with glaze.
18. Bake until golden brown, about 10 minutes.
This recipe was developed at the Lindt & Sprungli chocolate factory to showcase two of their fruit-filled bars. Formatted for MC and shared by dianne@olynet.com.
